summary: Iteration 63: CRITICAL EXPANSION validation COMPLETE. All 33 backend tests passed. Verified: (1) Position limits: max_arb_positions=40, max_concurrent_positions=85. (2) Arb min_liquidity=200, max_stale_age=300s. (3) Arb scanning ALL markets: markets_scanned=1099, binary_pairs=500. (4) Weather lifecycle_mode=shadow_exit with market_collapse_threshold=0.05. (5) Weather asymmetric diagnostic with candidates_scanned, rejected_by_model_prob, etc. (signals_generated=0 confirms non-viable). (6) PnL attribution has NO 'resolver' strategy. (7) Zombie resolver tracks zombies_force_resolved. (8) /api/controls has exposure_by_strategy and exposure_caps.
